name: avengers-claude-skills
description: Open-source Claude Code skills from Avengers-au

plugins.name: share-gist
plugins.description: Create secret GitHub gists from files and return a shareable URL — for sharing docs outside your org

plugins.name: recruiter-playbook
plugins.description: Generate a personalised, company-specific recruiter screening playbook with live research, tailored scripts, and social engineering angles

plugins.name: hm-screen-playbook
plugins.description: Generate a personalised, company-specific hiring manager screening playbook with live research, CARL story templates, social engineering angles, and reverse interview questions

plugins.name: tech-screen-playbook
plugins.description: Generate a personalised, category-aware technical phone screen playbook covering 10 job categories with live company and Glassdoor research

plugins.name: career-kb-builder
plugins.description: Conversationally extract career data and build a structured knowledge base for interview preparation — stories, achievements, metrics, and competency mapping

plugins.name: resume-linkedin-optimiser
plugins.description: Generate ATS-optimised, story-seeded resumes and LinkedIn profile recommendations from career data and target job descriptions

plugins.name: star-story-generator
plugins.description: Transform career data into company-specific CARL stories mapped to competency frameworks (Amazon LPs, Meta dimensions, Google attributes) with scope calibration and coverage analysis

plugins.name: behavioural-interview-playbook
plugins.description: Generate a personalised behavioural interview playbook with live company research, story-to-competency mapping, cognitive bias strategy, and company-specific easy outs
